steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request correction of Nokia dividend withholding from 13.5% to 15% treaty rate (FI-NO)
Submit formal claim citing Finland-Norway tax treaty Article 10 allowing 15% maximum withholding on dividends
If custodian cannot correct, file Form 6163e/6167e directly with Vero for EUR 3,607.50 refund
Reference Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement as supporting framework for streamlined corrections

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
